mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_undo_snapshot (snapshot_id, run_id, conversation_id, workspace, status, before_head, after_head, branch, before_worktree_oid, before_index_oid, after_worktree_oid, after_index_oid, changed_paths_json, changed_file_count, changed_byte_count, unavailability_reason, error_info, version, created_at, finalized_at, undone_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{snapshotId}, #{runId}, #{conversationId}, #{workspace}, #{status}, #{beforeHead}, #{afterHead}, #{branch}, #{beforeWorktreeOid}, #{beforeIndexOid}, #{afterWorktreeOid}, #{afterIndexOid}, #{changedPathsJson}, #{changedFileCount}, #{changedByteCount}, #{unavailabilityReason}, #{errorInfo}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{finalizedAt}, #{undoneAt}, #{expiresAt})

INSERT INTO agent_undo_snapshot (snapshot_id, run_id, conversation_id, workspace, status, before_head, after_head, branch, before_worktree_oid, before_index_oid, after_worktree_oid, after_index_oid, changed_paths_json, changed_file_count, changed_byte_count, unavailability_reason, error_info, version, created_at, finalized_at, undone_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{snapshotId}, #{runId}, #{conversationId}, #{workspace}, #{status}, #{beforeHead}, #{afterHead}, #{branch}, #{beforeWorktreeOid}, #{beforeIndexOid}, #{afterWorktreeOid}, #{afterIndexOid}, #{changedPathsJson}, #{changedFileCount}, #{changedByteCount}, #{unavailabilityReason}, #{errorInfo}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{finalizedAt}, #{undoneAt}, #{expiresAt}) ON CONFLICT(snapshot_id) DO UPDATE SET run_id = excluded.run_id, conversation_id = excluded.conversation_id, workspace = excluded.workspace, status = excluded.status, before_head = excluded.before_head, after_head = excluded.after_head, branch = excluded.branch, before_worktree_oid = excluded.before_worktree_oid, before_index_oid = excluded.before_index_oid, after_worktree_oid = excluded.after_worktree_oid, after_index_oid = excluded.after_index_oid, changed_paths_json = excluded.changed_paths_json, changed_file_count = excluded.changed_file_count, changed_byte_count = excluded.changed_byte_count, unavailability_reason = excluded.unavailability_reason, error_info = excluded.error_info, version = excluded.version, finalized_at = excluded.finalized_at, undone_at = excluded.undone_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE run_id = #{runId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE workspace = #{workspace} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_undo_snapshot WHERE status IN ('OPEN', 'SUSPENDED', 'READY') AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < #{now}
